positive: A stylized, intricate cosmic woodland scene. The composition features a central, glowing forest of bioluminescent, stylized trees and oversized fantasy flora, casting a soft, vibrant glow against a deep indigo and midnight blue starry sky. The style is detailed neo-folkloric illustration, resembling high-end tattoo art mixed with detailed stained-glass etching. Use strong, clean silhouettes of the foliage and subjects. The color palette should be dominated by luminous cyan, deep violet, emerald green, and accented with pops of warm gold light. The scene should feel dreamlike, mystical, and infinitely scalable for clothing printing. Composition must be perfectly centered, maximizing visual impact and clean edges. Art Deco elements subtly integrated into the structure of the trees and ground formations.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, messy, dirty, cartoon, grainy, low contrast, out of focus, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise
